title: Happy Birthday!
name: Burak Mavis
message: Another year of greatness begins! Your energy and dedication inspire everyone around you. Here's to unforgettable moments ahead.

title: Welcome to the Team!
name: Armaan Pandher
quote: University of Miami grad in AI & Data Science. Former competitive swim team captain — that discipline shapes how I work today. Outside of work, I'm into art and music.

title: Welcome to the Team!
name: Andreu Margarit
quote: I'm from Capellades, about an hour from Barcelona. I enjoy the gym, football, volleyball, piano, and card games. Excited to join the team!

title: 50× Claps — Record!
reason: For organizing BCN Data Nights at Talent Garden — bringing first-time speakers to stage and making the whole event flawless.

title: Conference Heroes!
reason: Huge kudos for stepping out of your comfort zone to host and speak at the conference. Your courage truly inspires the whole team!

title: Top Clap of the Week
reason: Thanks for all the effort on the audit prep and continuing to be a team player!
values: We work TOGETHER to SERVE OTHERS

title: Team Excellence
reason: Thank you for your consistent effort and professionalism. Your dedication and teamwork make a real difference!
values: We work TOGETHER to SERVE OTHERS

title: Clappy Winners — January
headline: 10 Stars Who Raised the Bar
description: Tomiris · Lidia G. · Maksym Fedorov · Ana Abuseridze · Sergio-Yersi · Antonio Clavelli · Baptiste · Emma · Sem Sinchenko · Alessandro — each with an incredible impact story.

title: First Time on Stage!
eventName: BCN Data Nights — AI Conference @ Talent Garden
description: Gleb, Evgenia & Maksym delivered complex AI topics to a live audience for the FIRST TIME. Emma managed logistics. Mariia made it happen.

title: Connect Groups
description: Employee-led communities on Circle — from books to leadership. This session covers Explore vs Execute mode, seasonality, and inclusion. New Gym group forming! DM Kasia to join.

title: Barcelona Office Week
headline: Another amazing week together!
quote: It was great to see everyone in person — it's always a special time when we get to connect face to face.
author: Mariia Moskvina

articles.title: The Vibe Coding Casino
articles.desc: A thought-provoking parallel between vibe coding and casinos. Dopamine-fueled coding — what could go wrong?

articles.title: Building Products That Agents Want
articles.desc: Essential viewing: how to build products in the AI agent era.

title: Recent Birthdays
name: Daniyal Ahmad, Dmitry Feshchenko, Roman Rinchinov & Hanna Minko
message: Hope you all had wonderful celebrations! The team sends love and best wishes for the year ahead.

title: Friday Celebrations
headline: Wins & Growth Moments
prompt1: 🌱 What made you proud this week — at work, at home, or in life?
prompt2: 💡 We celebrate failures because acknowledging them creates space for improvement.
coreValue: This is how we live Relentless Pursuit of Excellence. Share your wins and lessons every Friday in #general.
